dict.string:
Manage Google Tasks without leaving Alfred.
## Setup
1. Create a Google Cloud project and enable the **Tasks API** 2. Create a **Desktop** OAuth client and download `client_secret.json` 3. Run in Terminal: `mkdir -p ~/Library/Application\ Support/Alfred/Workflow\ Data/com.rhuss.gtasks/` `cp client_secret.json ~/Library/Application\ Support/Alfred/Workflow\ Data/com.rhuss.gtasks/` 4. Type `gt login` in Alfred to authenticate
Full instructions: [README](https://github.com/rhuss/alfred-google-tasks-workflow)
## Commands
- `gt login` — Authenticate with Google - `gt add Buy groceries, tomorrow` — Create task with due date - `gt add Call dentist, friday #Work` — Create task in specific list - `gt list` — Show tasks grouped by timeframe - `gt list #Work` — Filter by list - `gt open` — Open Google Tasks in browser - `gt logout` — Disconnect account
## Dates
Supported: **today**, **tomorrow**, **monday**–**sunday**, **next week**, **2026-07-15**, **07-15**
## Lists
Add `#ListName` at the end to target a list. Lists are auto-created if new. Hyphens and underscores become spaces: `#My-List` = "My List".
